title: daphne stenophylla
intro: Daphne stenophylla, also known as the Narrow-leaved Daphne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities, which are attributed to the presence of daphnetin and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Daphne stenophylla include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its ability to aid in the management of fever and pain. Daphne stenophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
